calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Holt-Smith.
Andres Serafica, Esq. for Plaintiff: Anthony Nguyen, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, matter submitted and taken under submission.
Counsel to prepare a summary of damages and a proposed Judgment for signature.

Nov. 8, 2007
The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Chao Zhen Ma as follows:
Damages $137,940.00
Attorney's Fees $1,500.00
Costs $370.00, for a total of $139,810.00
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
